text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today! It's a period of intense
training for racers to improve their skills.
However...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look at this, Trainer! It's an article about
this year's Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "Decisive Battle of BNW! A Whirlwind
of Emotions, Spectators in Awe!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is absorbed in the Twinkle Series
magazine.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, right! Sorry, I just... you know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's exciting summer camp begins
now.
